title: MCP Search Mode — Token & Cost Savings

panels.title: Avg prompt tokens — STANDARD mode (OpenAI, cold)
panels.description: Tool definitions sent to the model on the first call when ALL tools are advertised. Higher = more wasted context. (gpt-4o-mini, cold cache, averaged across tool counts.)

panels.title: Avg prompt tokens — SEARCH mode (OpenAI, cold)
panels.description: Tool definitions sent when only get_tool + invoke_tool are advertised. Stays flat regardless of backend tool count.

panels.title: Prompt-token reduction (OpenAI, cold)
panels.description: How much smaller the model's tool context is with search mode vs standard. Bigger is better.

panels.title: Prompt tokens vs tool count (the aha curve)
panels.description: Standard rises as the backend exposes more tools; search stays flat. The gap is the saving. (OpenAI, cold.)

panels.title: Avg USD cost per task by mode & tool count
panels.description: Real cache-aware dollar cost per agent task at gpt-4o-mini list prices (cold). Search bars are dramatically shorter. See the Deep-Dive dashboard for all modes, both models, and cold/warm cache.
